arts.ttl: Salah breaks record for most goals and assists in a 38-game Premier League season
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah set a new Premier League record with his 18th assist, taking his goal contributions to 45 for the season. This broke the record shared by Thierry Henry and Erling Haaland. Salah's assist came just days after signing a new contract with Liverpool, extending his stay until 2027.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane hits out at West Ham stars and claims Graham Potter faces a difficult task with 'a tough group to manage' ahead of clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: Roy Keane has criticised West Ham's stars as he branded them 'a tough group to manage'. Keane admitted that he had sympathy with West Ham boss Graham Potter.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher offers Virgil van Dijk contract timeline prediction - 'Mohamed Salah had his moment'
arts.sum: Liverpool have already ended uncertainty surrounding the future of Mohamed Salah as claims suggest captain Virgil van Dijk is on the verge of a new deal

arts.ttl: 2pm team news: Alisson + Bradley start, Delap a sub, no Son
arts.sum: Three matches kick off at 2pm BST The post 2pm team news: Alisson + Bradley start, Delap a sub, no Son appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Mavropanos and Soler return to starting XI for Liverpool visit
arts.sum: West Ham United: Areola, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Mavropanos, Scarles, Ward-Prowse, Soler, Paquetá, Kudus, Bowen © Alongside Füllkrug will be goalkeeper Łukasz Fabiański, defenders Vladimír Coufal and Emerson, midfielders Álvarez, Souček and Guido Rodríguez, and forwards Luis Guilherme and Evan Ferguson.
